tool.name: discover_api_spec
tool.description:
Probe ~30 well-known paths for an OpenAPI/Swagger spec on the target.
Hits each candidate with a GET and considers any 200 containing openapi/swagger markers a hit. Also parses swagger-ui/redoc/rapidoc HTML pages to extract the real spec URL they reference, and follows those to fetch the JSON.
Run this EARLY in the recon phase — a successful hit gives the agent the complete API contract in one call, often with 10x more endpoints than frontend crawling would reveal. Follow up with parse_api_spec on any returned content for a structured endpoint inventory.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target base URL or hostname (e.g., "https://api.target.com" or just "api.target.com"). Scheme is added automatically if missing.

parameter.name: include_yaml
parameter.description: If false, skip YAML candidates. Default true.

returns.description: target, base, candidates_checked count, specs_found count, found_specs list (url, content_type, size, kind, content_preview), quick_summary of the first parsed spec (title, version, total_paths, method_counts, first_20_paths), hits list.

tool.name: discover_graphql_endpoint
tool.description:
Find GraphQL endpoints on the target and attempt schema introspection.
Probes ~15 common paths (/graphql, /api/graphql, /query, /gql, /graphiql, /playground, /apollo, etc.) with a minimal `{ __typename }` query, then for any hit runs the full IntrospectionQuery. Even when the server's client-side "disable introspection" flag is set, the middleware often only blocks GET-introspection or specific header shapes — this tool catches the common misconfigurations.
Also tries Apollo-specific header variants (persisted queries, trace headers) because some servers only accept those shapes.

parameter.name: try_introspection
parameter.description: If true (default), run the full IntrospectionQuery against the first hit.

parameter.name: try_apollo_variants
parameter.description: If true (default), probe with Apollo persisted-query and trace headers to detect servers that only accept those shapes.

returns.description: target, base, hits list, hit_count, introspection result (with query/mutation type names, field lists, user-defined types), apollo_variants notes.
